nasb.text: He distributed to everyone of Israel, both man and woman, to everyone a loaf of bread and a portion of meat and a raisin cake.

esv.text: and distributed to all Israel, both men and women, to each a loaf of bread, a portion of meat, and a cake of raisins.

cnv.text: 他又分給以色列眾人，無論男女，每人一個餅、一塊肉、一個葡萄餅。

ccb.text: 又给以色列男女每人一个饼、一块肉和一个葡萄饼。
